recommendations.title: The Second Tragic Fantozzi
recommendations.overview: The frustrating adventures of a humble employee who all the time has to fullfill the wishes and desires of his bosses.

recommendations.title: Piranhas
recommendations.overview: A gang of teenage boys stalk the streets of Naples armed with hand guns and AK-47s to do their mob bosses' bidding – until they decide to be the bosses themselves.

recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: Bruno's plan to win back his ex-girlfriend hits a snag when he becomes attracted to her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Wild Orchid
recommendations.overview: A woman lawyer becomes mesmerized by a self-made millionaire during an encounter in Rio setting off a series of erotic encounters.

recommendations.title: Futurama: The Beast with a Billion Backs
recommendations.overview: Fresh off ripping space-time a new one at the end of "Bender's Big Score," the Planet Express crew is back to mend the tear in reality, or (hopefully) at least not make it worse.  Beyond the tear, though, lurks a being of inconceivable...tentacularit

recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.

recommendations.title: Lucky Number Slevin
recommendations.overview: Slevin is mistakenly put in the middle of a personal war between the city’s biggest criminal bosses. Under constant watch, Slevin must try not to get killed by an infamous assassin and come up with an idea of how to get out of his current dilemma.

recommendations.title: Housesitter
recommendations.overview: Con artist Gwen moves into Newton's empty home without his knowledge and begins setting up house, posing as his new wife.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: The Decoy Bride
recommendations.overview: A local woman is hired to draw paparazzi away from a Hollywood actress who has come to Scotland to get married.
